title: Remove OpenAI from the default model catalog (REQ-H5)
description: agents/model-intel.default.json ships 6 OpenAI + 4 Anthropic entries that violate the no-OpenAI default. Remove the OpenAI entries and align the default around the OpenRouter/qwen/deepseek affordable ladder used in agents/budget.json. Also stop agents/model-manager.mjs research() from fetching openai.com pricing. Spec: REQ-H5. Do NOT reintroduce any OpenAI dependency.
